brain.commentary: The council leans toward a modestly defensive stance. While the core equity indices (SPY, QQQ, DIA) retain modest long convictions, a majority of the high‑beta tech names and all crypto pairs are flat with negative composites and elevated volatility, indicating fragile signals. We therefore trim exposure overall and especially on the weaker, flat positions.
